name: Jet Lending, LLC
description_short: Texas-based hard money and asset-based lender specializing in fast real estate investment financing, offering short-term rehab loans and long-term DSCR loans nationwide.
description_long:
Jet Lending, LLC has operated as a Texas-based asset-based lender since 2004, establishing itself primarily in the real estate investment financing space. The company has funded over 4,000 loans totaling more than $650 million, positioning itself as an experienced player in alternative real estate lending. While currently categorized as a business lender, Jet Lending's core business centers on mortgage-style financing for real estate investors rather than traditional small business loans.

The company offers two primary loan products: short-term hard money loans designed for fix-and-flip and rehab projects with rapid funding (typically 7-10 days), and long-term DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for income-generating rental properties with terms up to 30 years. Both products use the real estate property as collateral and emphasize flexible underwriting criteria. Jet Lending advertises 100% financing availability, minimal paperwork requirements, and in-house underwriting to expedite the loan process. The company serves real estate investors nationwide from its Houston headquarters and maintains named loan officers for client management.

Jet Lending distinguishes itself through speed of closing, promotional recognition (Forbes Best Hard Money Lender for Customer Service 2024 & 2025), and emphasis on investor education. The company provides loan calculators, publishes educational content, and hosts events for real estate professionals. Client testimonials highlight rapid application processes (15 minutes noted) and quick funding timelines. The company explicitly targets both novice and experienced real estate investors with messaging emphasizing simplicity and accessibility to capital for investment property acquisition and improvement.

As an alternative lender, Jet Lending serves a specific niche: real estate investors who cannot qualify for traditional financing or require faster capital deployment. However, prospective borrowers should recognize that hard money loans and asset-based products typically carry higher interest rates and fees than conventional mortgages, though specific rate information is not disclosed on the website. The company's focus on investor properties rather than primary residences and its emphasis on asset-based rather than income-based underwriting represent important operational distinctions from traditional mortgage lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Rapid 7-10 day closing timeline with in-house underwriting for time-sensitive real estate deals
Offers 100% financing for property purchases and rehabilitation costs, reducing investor out-of-pocket requirements
Extended DSCR loan terms up to 30 years for long-term rental property investments
Named loan officer system providing continuity and personalized service for investors
Minimal application documentation burden with emphasis on streamlined, 15-minute application process
Forbes-recognized customer service awards (2024 & 2025) in the hard money lending category
Educational resources and investor events to support borrower financial literacy and deal analysis
cons: Hard money loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates and fees compared to conventional mortgages, though specific rates not disclosed
Asset-based lending criteria may still result in rejection for severely distressed credit profiles or minimal collateral equity
Product specialization in investment properties means no financing available for primary residence purchases or personal use properties
Website lacks transparent pricing information, rate ranges, or fee schedules required for borrower comparison shopping
Limited disclosure regarding loan approval timeline variability and factors affecting the stated 7-10 day closing estimate
best_for: Real estate investors seeking fast capital for fix-and-flip or rehab projects on tight timelines
Landlords purchasing or refinancing multiple rental properties focusing on cash flow rather than personal income documentation
First-time real estate investors seeking simplified application processes and educational support
Investors with non-traditional income or credit profiles unable to qualify for conventional mortgage financing
diagnosis: Jet Lending is best suited for real estate investors (both experienced and novice) who need rapid capital deployment for investment property purchases and improvements and cannot qualify for or obtain conventional financing. The primary caveat is that hard money and asset-based loans command substantially higher costs than traditional mortgages, making them most economically viable for short-term projects or investors whose profit margins support the premium pricing.
services: Short-term hard money loans for fix-and-flip and property rehabilitation projects
Long-term DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans for income-generating rental properties
Loan pre-approval process for qualifying investors
Online loan calculator for project cost and financing estimation
Loan draw request processing for funded projects
Loan officer assignment and relationship management
Real estate investor education programs and resources
Industry events and networking for real estate professionals
Blog and educational content on real estate investing
100% financing option covering purchase and repair costs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
